concept: Dream up a racing game where competitors drive vehicles powered by bottled emotions collected from dream harvesters. Strategically deploy specific feelings—nostalgia for sticky terrain grip, exhilaration for speed boosts, melancholy for defensive shields—to navigate courses constructed from collective unconscious material. Customize your emotion-fueled engine to emphasize particular psychological energies that match your racing style. Challenge rival drivers representing different schools of psychological thought as you compete for the title of Subconscious Champion.
